interactions.body: [Your Credit Builder Account] I didn’t get along with Together alone, I try to apply for a loan. I canceled it now I’m getting charged five dollars for this thing. I thought it was for the loan.
[Your Credit Builder Account] I wanna cancel I thought I canceled this if I cancel this when I get charged

(CB CANCEL - Specific email subject lines) [RE:Your Credit Builder Account] Hi Christopher,
 
Thanks for getting in touch.
 
I can see that you signed up for a CreditBuilder account AND applied for a $3000 loan on 02/24/2026. 

When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5, which we report to the Credit Bureaus as payment for a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, your CreditBuilder account is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. When you do find yourself ready, with the help of a co-signer, Together Loans can help you access funds too! At which point, any CreditBuilder loan you have will be paid in full on your behalf.

You can find out more about the Together Loans CreditBuilder here - https://togetherloans.com/together-loans-credit-builder/ . However, I can confirm that I have canceled your CreditBuilder account, you will not be charged again. 

We still have your loan application approved for you. All you need is a cosigner, a friend or a family member who has a 750+ credit score and agrees to make the payment if you can't. Follow this link to pick up where you left off: https://tcrdt.com/s/XGWXJ6KO

If you need help, please let me know
 
Have a great day, 
Jade @ Together Loans CreditBuilder

(CB - 'CLOSE') Hi Christopher, on 02/24/2026 you signed up for a CreditBuilder account AND applied for a loan of $3000. I have now cancelled your CreditBuilder account, you will not be charged again. You can find out more about the benefits of CreditBuilder here: https://togetherloans.com/together-loans-credit-builder/. In the meantime, the loan for $3000 is still approved, click here to pick up where you left off https://tcrdt.com/s/XGWXJ6KO. Jade, Together Loans

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Dominic, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/JIYIFV25 - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Together Loans

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is funded. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be canceled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

Information provided to Together Loans by you:

Borrower: Cody ******
IP: 169.254.130.1
DateTime (UTC): 03-23-2026
Stated Monthly Income: Self Employed $5000
Rent: $0.00
Bills: $0.00
Other Expenses: $600.00
Your Credit Commitments: $0.00
Together Loans Repayment: $137.39
To be safe: $50.00
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $4212.61


Yours sincerely
Together Loans Applications Dept

Hi Maria, we accept most banks but not online banks such as Go2Bank and Cashapp, as we can't verify identity through these companies. We also can’t accept joint accounts between borrowers and cosigners, or prepaid accounts.  You must provide an account that is open, valid, in their name and capable of ACH payments. 

If you need to amend your bank details, please use this link https://tcrdt.com/s/YV1M07RR Remember the account should be open, valid and capable of ACH payments. Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Africa@TransformCredit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Maria, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/TD12SYRV - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

interactions.body: Hi Maria, the $3000 loan will be deposited into your cosigner's account via ACH. This is to protect them against fraud, and make sure they’re fully aware of the loan. By transferring the funds to you, they’re also confirming they understand, and agree to, their role and responsibilities as your cosigner. We accept most banks but not online banks such as Chime and Cashapp, as we can't verify the cosigner’s identity through these companies. We also can’t accept joint accounts between borrowers and cosigners, or prepaid accounts. Your co-signer must provide an account that is open, valid, in their name and capable of ACH payments. Ask your co-signer to add a suitable bank here:  Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Together Loans

interactions.body: Hi Maria. This is Together Loans. We received your application from a third-party broker, perhaps you were shopping around for a loan in the past few months and they thought we would be a good fit. We offer unsecured, cosigner-based personal loans from $3,000-$10,000 & mainly serve those turned down by big banks or other loan providers. We're usually the cheaper option too! Our aim is to help those with lower credit scores build their credit history back up. Your application is active but you need to add a co signer to proceed. A good co-signer is a friend or family member who knows YOU and trusts YOU. They agree to make any repayments you’re unable to make - just like a safety net to catch you, in case you’re ever in trouble. They need a good credit score, usually of about 700, and most co-signers own their own home. Continue your application here: https://tcrdt.com/s/CCNEJN3Y or let me know if you have any questions. Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Together Loans

[Your Together Loans Loan Application : *****************20009] Hi Maria,

Thank you for contacting Together Loans, your message is really important to us.

I can see that your application is active and you still have some tasks to finish before the loan is paid. Your current application contemplates a loan of $3000, over 24 months, paying back $177.13 monthly, but you can change these terms anytime before the loan is paid.

Together Loans is a cosigner-based lender.  This means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them, regardless of the loan that you're applying for and your credit score. Normally, a cosigner is a friend or a family member who knows you (the borrower) and trusts that it is a good idea for you to borrow money. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 700 and a strong history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.

How does the application journey work? When you apply online, we will send you a unique link for your cosigner to register. As soon as we have everything we need from both of you, we’ll transfer the money. The money is transferred into your cosigner's account. This is to protect them, and us, against identity fraud, as transferring the money into their account ensures that they are fully aware of the loan.

You can check here more information about the application journey and common questions: https://togetherloans.com/faq 

To complete your application journey and check what is the next step, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/CCNEJN3Y

Any other questions, please let me know.

Have a nice day,
Aldrine@Together Loans

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Sergio, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. interactions.body: [Affordability Confirmation] When will I receive this

(Progress Update - LEAD/NoGT BRW Email) [RE:Affordability Confirmation] Hi Byron,

We've got your $5000 reserved, you and your cosigner just need to finish your application by submitting your information.

Use this link to pick up where you left off: https://tcrdt.com/s/SSIJQB91

We will always do everything we can to make sure your loan is paid out as quickly as possible. We aim to pay out every loan within 24 hours of the cosigner being accepted (remember - your cosigner can be ANYONE you know who is a US resident, has a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time). 

If you and your cosigner complete the application online and all checks are completed without issue, we could get the money to you sooner than 24 hours. If we find that we need more information when we review your application, we'll be in contact - so make sure you're available to speak to us & follow any instructions that we send you as soon as possible.

In the meantime, you'll find helpful answers to lots of questions in our website FAQs: https://transformcredit.com/faq

Jade,
Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi SHAUN, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/ALBRFVBG - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Transform Credit

interactions.body:
[I was approved] I was approved loan code g5kbv95y my name is Steven ****** my phone
number is ******* thank you

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : *****************32806] Hi Steven,

Thank you for contacting Transform Credit, your message is really important to us.

I can see that your application is active and you still have some tasks to finish before the loan is paid. Your current application contemplates a loan of $5000, over 60 months, paying back $180.67 monthly, but you can change these terms anytime before the loan is paid.

Transform Credit is a cosigner-based lender.  This means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them, regardless of the loan that you're applying for and your credit score. Normally, a cosigner is a friend or a family member who knows you (the borrower) and trusts that it is a good idea for you to borrow money. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 750 and a strong history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.

How does the application journey work? When you apply online, we will send you a unique link for your cosigner to register. As soon as we have everything we need from both of you, we’ll transfer the money. The money is transferred into your cosigner's account. This is to protect them, and us, against identity fraud, as transferring the money into their account ensures that they are fully aware of the loan.

You can check here more information about the application journey and common questions: https://transformcredit.com/faq 

To complete your application journey and check what is the next step, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/BBB9EOEF

Any other questions, please let me know.

Have a nice day,
Sophie@TransformCredit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Alicia, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/JDTDH79Q - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(Product Questions BRW Email) [Notification from Transform Credit] Hi Shermia

Here at Together Loans, we're a lender but our loans are a little different. Most lenders look at your credit history to decide whether you can borrow from them, based on how you've previously handled your money. We don't do that - our loans are based on the trust of your cosigner. 

We offer loans between $3,000 and $10,000 over 24 - 60 months, in an ever-growing number of states. The loan amounts and rates we offer are state-dependent - you can find our state license details here: https://togetherloans.com/Licenses. Your instalment payments will depend on your chosen loan (you can check the options using our sliders at: https://togetherloans.com). Our maximum APR is 35.99%, with no hidden fees! The interest on your loan is calculated daily, so if you pay your loan back early it'll cost you less in interest. 

If you'd like to check, or change the specific payment amounts of your loan, you can here: https://tcrdt.com/s/LCXC9Y3D

If you'd like to read more about what our existing customers think about our service, you can check out our reviews at: https://tglns.com/s/7PJ81RK2. You may also find answers to your other questions on our website in our frequently asked questions section: https://togetherloans.com/Help/Contact. Otherwise, you're welcome to reply to this email explaining in detail and someone will get back to you as soon as possible. 

Thanks,
Jade@Together Loans

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Rashoid, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/G6C4I3VP - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Together Loans

spk_1: I'm doing well. How about
spk_0: yourself? I'm hanging in there. Um, I've had someone that was gonna pay my loan off. We have been trying to do it online, but now she's saying she's just gonna leave the loan because I couldn't get anybody, so she didn't think the loan was pretty much real.
spk_1: Yeah, there was quite a backlog on Monday for returning calls and text messages, um, so you know we got back to you as soon as we can.
spk_0: Um,
spk_1: I do apologize for that. Um, I can send you information regarding. Settling the loan if you would um like to look at it. Well,
spk_0: I already found all of the information. It's just that she was trying to do it on her debit card, but it wasn't allowing us. We already added the debit card to the account, so now I need to remove her card off my account so none of the payments will come off it.
spk_1: You know the last four of the card?
spk_0: Let me look it up because it's on the on the roughing uh
spk_1: 2730.
spk_0: Right, that's Rodney's mom, but yeah. Yeah,
spk_1: I can go ahead and remove that one second. OK, and the reason why. So for settling the loan we typically prefer uh ACH transfers. now we can set up a Payment to complete with the card on file but we have to set it up as a voluntary Payment plan to complete the next day because we can only collect 3 times the amount of the uh regular monthly Payment Due over the phone so it's just a security, you know, purpose to make sure, you know, cards aren't getting accidentally ran and you know just it's
spk_0: just a
spk_1: security measure, yeah, so if she still wants. To make that Payment we can set it up um or she can do an ACH transfer which is within the uh information that um you can find in the mobile app you have the mobile app downloaded?
spk_0: Yeah I do but um I mean she was willing to use her Bank account information but it it's not allowing me to take mine out or put hers in when I go to add new it's just uh giving me the option to add a card.
spk_1: Hm yeah I mean she should here let me because I don't think you're doing it through let me send you an actual a different I'm gonna send you an email OK?
spk_0: OK. Yeah, because I'm on the Together Loans app.
spk_1: So within this email I'm sending you there's actually a link that will take you to the uh
spk_0: website.
spk_1: Let me see if that makes a difference. I mean, yeah, so she can set up an ACH Payment. Um, she just needs to add our, you know, use the, the loan, uh, ID as a reference and use our account routing number,
spk_0: OK, but if she wouldn't have to go through her Bank, it could be done on the, on the app, on the website?
spk_1: It should allow her to. Do it that way, um, you know I'm, I'm never on the other side of these, you know what I mean, so I don't know specifically of the hoops that makes you jump through, um, what I, I also can do is I can set it up so, uh, your phone call gets priority, so it'll bypass anything else and the call will come directly to one of the agents. Would you like me to set that up too so you guys can call and we can set that up
spk_0: and I'll, I'll see if I can talk her into doing it again.
spk_1: Yeah, just let her know that you know Mondays are. Because we basically we we return calls in the order that we Received and since we're not open on Saturday and Sunday we have a backlog of calls uh to make we try to get them as quickly as we can and of course the current state of affairs in the US right now I mean
spk_0: it's
spk_1: you know we've been a lot busier than than we have previously so we're just trying to keep up with everything so I, I do apologize that that, you know, it did take a little bit but I I've set this up to, uh, so your call will take precedence and I said. Set up through Friday. So no matter,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Kelsey, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/L3LDO0PO - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Together Loans

[Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: *****************40106] Hi DIAMOND,

Thanks for choosing Transform Credit, we have attached your Proposed Credit Contract with this email for you to keep. This does not mean that your application has been approved, but it gives you a chance to read and understand the terms of the agreement. 

To finalize your application please complete all of the required steps online - https://transformcredit.com/hub?aref=*****************40106 

If you have any questions about our application process please visit our website https://transformcredit.com/faq

Amber @ Transform Credit

[Affordability Confirmation] To DIAMOND ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to charges of criminal fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: DIAMOND ******
IP: 98.46.109.113
DateTime (UTC): 11-01-2023
Stated Monthly Income: Part Time Employed $2500
Rent: $1100
Bills: $100
Other Expenses: $300
Your Credit Commitments: $0
Transform Credit Repayment: $177.130000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $772.870000


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

[Affordability Confirmation] To Mariana ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

[Affordability Confirmation] To Huy ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

[Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: *****************10501] Hi EDMUND,

https://transformcredit.com/credit-education-program

Amber @ Transform Credit

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to charges of criminal fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

interactions.body: (AI BW Bank - Bank criteria SMS) Hi David, we accept most banks but not online banks such as Chime and Cashapp, as we can't verify the cosigner's identity through these companies. We also can't accept joint accounts between borrowers and cosigners, or prepaid accounts. Hope must provide an account that is open, valid, in their name and capable of ACH payments. Ask Hope to add a suitable bank here: https://tcrdt.com/s/3QTZD5FJ Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Transform Credit

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : *****************43205] Hi Pedro,
Thank you for reaching out and sharing your thoughts. I want to assure you that we deeply value feedback from our customers, and we take your concerns very seriously.

At TransformCredit, we strive to support and serve a diverse range of customers, including those from Hispanic and non-English-speaking backgrounds. While our current processes do primarily rely on English communication, this is not a reflection of any bias or exclusion. It is simply a limitation we are actively working to improve.

Currently, our website, terms, and conditions are written in English. Naturally, if someone does not speak or understand English, it can make it challenging to navigate the application process. This is a reality we recognize and regret. As a business, we are fully aware that this not only limits accessibility but also causes us to lose potential customers who would otherwise qualify for loans.

I want you to know that we are committed to changing this. By this time next year, we hope to expand our capabilities to better serve Spanish-speaking customers. This includes updating our licenses, translating our website, and revising our terms and conditions to accommodate and support a broader range of customers, regardless of their primary language.
Being a borrower or a cosigner is a serious responsibility and it would be unlawful for us to lend to someone where we knew there was an obvious language barrier, putting that person into a vulnerable situation where they may not fully understand the agreement they are entering into. 

We appreciate your understanding.
Thanks, Transform Credit

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 700+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/2B1GJPQM - we'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

[Your Together Loans Loan Application : *****************43420] Hi Michael,
I truly understand how frustrating this situation must feel, and I want to assure you that your message has been heard and taken seriously. At Together Loans, we believe in offering chances and helping people access fair credit options. That’s exactly why our loans are based on trust and supported by a cosigner instead of requiring perfect credit from borrowers.

However, as a regulated lender, we must also ensure that every loan is set up responsibly and in line with state and federal lending laws. This includes verifying that the cosigner meets our minimum credit and affordability criteria, not because we want to make it difficult, but because it protects both you and them from financial hardship down the road. Unfortunately, your cosigner Robert failed to meet all our internal requirements when applying for this loan and so their application was declined. For data privacy we cannot disclose the specific reason to you. We have sent your cosigner a detailed email explaining the reason behind this decision.

We still have the $4500 reserved for you. To continue, you will need another cosigner, please let them know that they must complete all steps correctly. You can invite another cosigner using this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/S9L2OBSZ

I can assure you that we do not scam or defraud our customers. We help hundreds of customers daily build up their credit score by offering cosigner loans and our Credit builder account. Our processes all follow applicable State and Federal laws and legislations that are applicable to our organization. Furthermore, Transform Credit Inc. DBA Together Loans is registered with the Nationwide Multistate Licensing System (NMLS), with license number 1905055. You can find this information on our website:  https://togetherloans.com/Licenses. We have annual state audits in order to maintain our licenses, and if there were any significant issues, we would be unable to lend.

We’re not here to make things harder, we’re here to make them safe, fair, and transparent for every customer. Please let us know if you need more help.

[Affordability Confirmation] To Jennifer ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled.
